zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Goodale II於1470年出生在英國諾福爾可堂納姆 韋斯特時，他的父親Sir John Goodale I20歲，母親Elizabeth Parlett20歲。他於1490年與Lady Margaret Boso在英國英格蘭結婚。他們至少是5個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1543年在英國享年73歲。

nameMeanings.name: Goodale
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London and East Anglia): variant of   Goodall  .

variants.name: Goodall
meanings: metonymic occupational name from Middle English god(e) ‘good’ + ale ‘ale’; perhaps denoting an innkeeper or tan ale taster. An ale taster was a manorial or borough court official appointed to regulate the quality of ale sold by inns and alewives, especially with the duty of preventing the sale of sour or watered-down ale.
alternatively, it may be a habitational name from Gowdall near Snaith, in Yorkshire. This place was named in Old English with golde ‘marigold’ + halh ‘nook, recess’.

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Goodale II was born in 1470, in Downham West, Norfolk, England, his father, Sir John Goodale I, was 20 and his mother, Elizabeth Parlett, was 20. He married Lady Margaret Boso in 1490, in England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 5 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1543, in England, at the age of 73.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Goodale II est né en 1470, à Downham West, Norfolk, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Goodale I, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Parlett, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Boso en 1490, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1543, à Angleterre, à l’âge de 73 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Goodale II 1470 in Downham West, Norfolk, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Goodale I 20 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Parlett 20. Er hat 1490 in England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Boso geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1543 im Alter von 73 Jahren in England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Goodale II è nato il nel 1470 nel Downham West, Norfolk, England, il suo padre, Sir John Goodale I, aveva 20 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Parlett, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Boso nel 1490, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 5 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1543, nel England, all'età di 73 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Goodale IIが1470年にイギリスノーフォルクダウンハム ウエストで生まれた時，父Sir John Goodale Iは20歳，母Elizabeth Parlettは20歳であった。1490年にイギリスイギリスでLady Margaret Bosoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも5人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1543年にイギリスで73歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Goodale II(이)가 1470년 영국 노르폴크 다운함 웨스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Goodale I(은)는 20세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Parlett(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1490년 영국 잉글랜드에서 Lady Margaret Boso(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1543년 영국에서 73세의 나이로 사망했다.
